text: 2. If Contractor or any Subcontractor of any tier leases one or more employees through the use of a payroll, employee management, or other similar company, then Contractor or any Subcontractor of any tier must procure workers ' compensation insurance written on an 'if any' policy form, including an endorsement providing coverage for alternate employer/leased employee liability.  Such insurance shall be in addition to the workers' compensation coverage provided to the leased employee by the payroll, employee management, or other similar company.
